title: ephemerum nummularia
intro: Ephemerum nummularia, also known as Nummularia Moss or Coin Moss, is a species of moss in the family Ephemeraceae, characterized by its small, coin-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Ephemerum nummularia are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Ephemerum nummularia can be prepared into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and is often used in herbal medicine to support respiratory and skin health.
